category_sources: Official GitHub repository https://github.com/nbrownus/mlogger describes mlogger as a utility that logs different sources to syslog.
source_facts.description says mlogger logs to syslog from the command line.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository https://github.com/nbrownus/mlogger uses the heading mlogger.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated in the input, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says it is a simple utility that logs different sources to syslog.
